title: Hero sequence loads and shows overlays
description: Verifies the home page hero transitions from loading to the interactive hero content with name and subtitle overlays visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero frames to preload
Verify the hero canvas content is displayed
Verify the name and subtitle overlays are displayed during the hero

title: Hero sequence advances on scroll and hands off to next section
description: Verifies scrolling advances through the hero track and the page continues to the next section after the hero ends.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero frames to preload
Scroll vertically through the hero track to advance frames
Scroll past the hero end to continue down the page
Verify the user reaches the content section after the hero

title: Hero shows load error UI when frames fail and page remains usable
description: Verifies that if the hero preload fails, an error state is shown and the user can still scroll to the rest of the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero frames to preload
Wait for the hero load process to either complete or show an error state
Verify a hero load error UI message is visible
Scroll past the hero area to continue to page content
Verify the user reaches the content section after the hero

title: Hero remains functional after brief pause mid-scroll
description: Verifies the hero remains interactive when the user pauses during the scroll-driven sequence and then continues scrolling.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero frames to preload
Scroll vertically partway through the hero track
Wait for a short moment
Scroll further through the hero track
Verify the hero canvas content is still displayed
Verify the name and subtitle overlays are still displayed during the hero

title: About section reveals via terminal typing animation on enter
description: Verifies that scrolling the about section into view shows the terminal prompt and reveals about copy.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the about section enters view
Verify an animated terminal prompt appears in the about section
Verify the about copy is displayed in the terminal-styled block

title: About section content is readable after animation completes
description: Verifies the about content remains visible and readable after the typing-style reveal finishes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the about section enters view
Wait for the typing-style reveal to complete
Verify the full about copy is displayed in the terminal-styled block

title: Experience timeline renders and is readable
description: Verifies the experience section shows a timeline/list with role titles, organizations, dates, and highlights visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the experience section
Verify experience entries are displayed in a timeline or list format
Verify role titles, organization names, dates, and highlights are visible for experience entries

title: Experience timeline remains readable while scrolling through entries
description: Verifies the experience section remains usable as the user scrolls through the timeline content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the experience section
Scroll through the experience timeline content
Verify additional experience entry content becomes visible as the user scrolls
Verify role titles and highlights remain visible and readable

title: Projects grid renders on the portfolio page
description: Verifies the projects section loads and displays a grid of project cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the projects section
Verify a grid of project cards is displayed

title: Project card hover reveals expanded content
description: Verifies hovering a project card shows additional details via the hover affordance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the projects section
Hover over a project card
Verify expanded project details are displayed for the hovered card

title: Project cards remain readable without hover interaction
description: Verifies project card title and summary content are readable without relying on hover effects.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the projects section
Verify each visible project card shows readable title and summary content

title: Hovering multiple project cards works consistently
description: Verifies hover affordances can be triggered on more than one card without breaking the grid interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the projects section
Hover over the first project card
Hover over a different project card
Verify expanded project details are displayed for the most recently hovered card

title: Projects section remains usable after scrolling away and back
description: Verifies the projects grid still renders and can be interacted with after additional scrolling.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the projects section
Scroll to a different section of the page
Scroll back to the projects section
Verify a grid of project cards is displayed

title: Contact form submits successfully with valid inputs
description: Verifies a valid contact submission results in a visible success status message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact footer
Fill in the name field with Test User
Fill in the reply-to email field with test.user@example.com
Fill in the message field with Hello, this is an automated test message.
Submit the form
Verify a success status message is visible below the form

title: Contact form shows validation error when required fields are missing
description: Verifies missing required fields prevent successful submission and show an error status message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact footer
Fill in the name field with Test User
Fill in the reply-to email field with test.user@example.com
Submit the form
Verify a validation error message is visible below the form

title: Contact form shows validation error for an invalid email format
description: Verifies the form rejects an invalid reply-to email and shows an error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact footer
Fill in the name field with Test User
Fill in the reply-to email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the message field with Testing invalid email validation.
Submit the form
Verify a validation error message is visible below the form

title: Contact form allows resubmission after a validation error
description: Verifies the user can correct inputs after an error and submit again successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact footer
Fill in the reply-to email field with invalid-email-format
Submit the form
Fill in the reply-to email field with test.user@example.com
Fill in the name field with Test User
Fill in the message field with Corrected details after validation error.
Submit the form
Verify a success status message is visible below the form

title: Custom terminal cursor follows pointer on desktop
description: Verifies the decorative terminal cursor appears and moves with pointer motion on fine-pointer devices.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the mouse across the page
Verify a custom cursor indicator follows the pointer

title: Page remains usable with normal cursor behavior
description: Verifies the page remains navigable and interactive without relying on the custom cursor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Verify the page content remains visible and interactive during scrolling
